exports.getLocationChangeInfo = router.getLocationChangeInfo; exports.getMatchedRoutes = router.getMatchedRoutes; exports.lazyFn = router.lazyFn; exports.trailingSlashOptions = router.trailingSlashOptions; exports.createRouterConfig = config.createRouterConfig; exports.retainSearchParams = searchMiddleware.retainSearchParams; exports.stripSearchParams = searchMiddleware.stripSearchParams; exports.defaultParseSearch = searchParams.defaultParseSearch;
